en_title: Marvel's Wolverine Actor Confirms Role in GTA 6
subtitle: 金刚狼演员加盟
opus_summary: 《漫威金刚狼》剑齿虎演员Brett Gipson已确认出演《GTA6》Ellis一角，另有多位演员透露参演。游戏预购本周开启，官方封面已公布，将于11月19日登陆XBOX Series和PS5。

paragraphs.en: A handful of actors have started confirming they have roles in Grand Theft Auto , including one of the stars of Marvel's Wolverine.
paragraphs.cn: 已有好几位演员确认将出演《侠盗猎车手》，其中就包括一位曾参演《漫威金刚狼》的明星。

paragraphs.en: Actor Brett Gipson, who plays Sabretooth in Marvel's Wolverine, has added GTA 6 to his resume . The resume notes that he will be playing a character named Ellis, but no other details have been confirmed. It's unclear how big his role will be but, for what it's worth, there's no indication that we've even seen Ellis in any of the trailers or screenshots thus far. Although the focus has been primarily on the game's two protagonists, Jason and Lucia, Rockstar has shone a light on a few supporting characters, including Jason's friend, Cal Hampton, and his boss, Brian Heder.
paragraphs.cn: 在《漫威金刚狼》中饰演剑齿虎的演员Brett Gipson，已经将《GTA6》加入了自己的履历。简历上注明他将扮演一名叫Ellis的角色，但其他细节尚未得到确认。目前还不清楚他的戏份有多重，但话说回来，至少我们还没有在任何预告片或截图中见过Ellis的身影。尽管游戏的重点一直放在两位主角Jason和Lucia身上，但Rockstar也展示了一些配角，比如Jason的朋友Cal Hampton和他的老板Brian Heder。

paragraphs.en: Gipson isn't the only actor to reveal their in GTA 6. Actors like Katie Burke, Ignacio Navarro, and Massi Furlan have all disclosed that they're in the highly anticipated game. Some of these appear to be background characters like random NPCs, while others are withholding their exact roles. It's unclear if Rockstar has granted actors permission to share their roles, but it would make sense as marketing ramps up for the game.
paragraphs.cn: Gipson并非唯一透露自己参演《GTA6》的演员。Katie Burke、Ignacio Navarro和Massi Furlan等演员都已披露自己将出现在这款备受期待的游戏中。其中一些似乎是扮演路人之类的背景角色，而另一些人则对具体角色三缄其口。目前尚不清楚Rockstar是否允许演员们公开自己的角色，但随着营销活动的升温，这样做也在情理之中。

paragraphs.en: It's likely that performance capture for GTA 6 has concluded, or is close to being finished, as Rockstar barrels toward the finish line. Pre-orders will open for GTA 6 later this week, with some fans believing a third trailer may drop at the same time. Last week, Rockstar also revealed the official cover art for GTA 6 , which signaled to fans that the game is indeed releasing on time this November .
paragraphs.cn: 《GTA6》的动作捕捉工作可能已经完成，或者接近收尾，Rockstar正在全力冲刺。这款游戏的预购将于本周晚些时候开启，部分粉丝认为第三支预告片也可能同时放出。上周，Rockstar还公布了《GTA6》的官方封面图，这向粉丝们传递了游戏将在今年11月如期发售的信号。

paragraphs.en: Whether or not Rockstar itself will announce any casting for GTA 6 itself remains to be seen. Fans have spent years speculating over casting, and have even seemingly found out the actors for certain characters, but nothing has been confirmed. Previously, Rockstar has kept casting a secret up until the release of its games, but maybe it'll take a new approach with GTA 6.
paragraphs.cn: Rockstar是否会亲自公布《GTA6》的演员阵容，还有待观察。粉丝们多年来一直在猜测选角，甚至似乎找出了某些角色的扮演者，但尚未得到任何证实。过去，Rockstar一直将选角保密到游戏发售，但这次或许会为《GTA6》采取新的做法。

paragraphs.en: Grand Theft Auto 6 will be released on November 19th for Xbox Series X|S and PS5.
Cade Onder is a freelancer for IGN's news team. He covers all things entertainment, including gaming, film, and more. You can find him on Twitter @Cade_Onder.
paragraphs.cn: Cade Onder是IGN新闻团队的撰稿人。他报道娱乐领域的各种内容，包括游戏、电影等。你可以在X上找到他 @Cade_Onder。
